title: WebSearch360 — Full-Featured News Aggregator

requirements.text: Implement a first-visit onboarding modal that collects the user's Name, Email, and an 'Enable Email Delivery Mode' checkbox. Store all values in localStorage. Display the explanation: 'We'll notify you by email only when a MAJOR disaster or catastrophic event occurs worldwide.' Do not show the modal on subsequent visits.

quotes: On first visit, show a full-screen welcome modal asking for: User's Name, User's Email, A checkbox to Enable Email Delivery Mode

acceptanceCriteria: Modal appears on first visit and is skipped on return visits (localStorage flag set)
Name, Email, and Email Delivery Mode values are persisted to localStorage
Explanation text is displayed inside the modal
Modal closes after submission and main app is visible

requirements.text: Build the app header with the 'WebSearch360' brand name accompanied by a globe/radar icon, a dark mode toggle button, and a settings gear icon that opens the settings panel.

quotes: App name 'WebSearch360' with a globe/radar icon
Dark mode toggle button in header
Settings gear icon

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays 'WebSearch360' and a globe/radar icon
Dark mode toggle switches between dark and light themes
Settings gear icon opens the settings slide-in panel

requirements.text: Implement top navigation tabs: ALL | Politics | National | International | Sports | War | Business | Technology | Science | Health | Entertainment | Weather. Switching tabs filters the displayed news cards to the selected category. The ALL tab shows every article combined.

quotes: Top navigation tabs: ALL | Politics | National | International | Sports | War | Business | Technology | Science | Health | Entertainment | Weather

acceptanceCriteria: All 12 tabs are rendered and clickable
ALL tab displays articles from every category
Each category tab shows only articles tagged with that category
Active tab is visually highlighted

requirements.text: Add a search bar on the ALL tab. When the user types a query (e.g., 'Israel Iran war'), filter and display all matching articles across categories with matched keywords highlighted in the results.

quotes: Search bar at the top — when user types something like 'Israel Iran war', it filters and displays ALL matching articles with highlighted keywords

acceptanceCriteria: Search bar is visible on the ALL tab
Typing filters articles in real time
Matched keywords are visually highlighted in headline and summary
Clearing the search restores the full feed

requirements.text: Display a 'Live' badge showing last updated time on the main feed. Show a countdown timer labeled 'Next update in: XX:XX' that counts down to the next auto-refresh. Auto-refresh news data every 60 minutes (default) and show a loading spinner during refresh.

quotes: 'Live' badge showing last updated time
Auto-refresh every 60 minutes with a countdown timer showing 'Next update in: XX:XX'
Show a loading spinner when refreshing

acceptanceCriteria: Live badge shows the last updated timestamp
Countdown timer decrements from the selected refresh interval
Data refresh is triggered when timer reaches zero
Loading spinner is displayed during the refresh cycle

requirements.text: Create news card components. Each card must include: a color-coded category badge, bold headline, 2–3 sentence summary, source name and publication timestamp, a 'Read More' button, a thumbnail image placeholder, and a red pulsing 'DISASTER' or 'BREAKING' badge for critical articles.

quotes: Each news card should have: Category badge (color-coded per category), Headline (bold), Short summary/description, Source name + publication time, 'Read More' button, Disaster/Breaking badge for critical news (red pulsing badge), Thumbnail image placeholder

acceptanceCriteria: Cards render all required fields
Category badge color matches the defined palette for each category
Breaking/Disaster articles show a red pulsing badge
Thumbnail placeholder is shown when no image is available

requirements.text: Generate at least 88 realistic mock news articles (8–10 per category) as the app's data source. Articles must include: real-sounding 2025–2026 headlines, 2–3 sentence summaries, varied sources (Reuters, AP, BBC, CNN, Al Jazeera, Fox News, ESPN, etc.), timestamps within the last 24 hours, a mix of regular and 'breaking' tagged articles, and at least 2–3 articles tagged as 'DISASTER' level (critical severity) for testing the email alert system. Use this mock data as the primary/fallback data source.

quotes: Fallback to rich mock data with 8-10 articles per category (80+ total articles)
The mock data should be VERY realistic with actual current-sounding headlines from 2025-2026
At least 2-3 'DISASTER' level articles for testing email alerts

acceptanceCriteria: At least 88 articles exist across all 11 categories
Every article has headline, summary, source, timestamp, category, and severity fields
At least 2–3 articles are tagged severity: critical (DISASTER)
Timestamps are within 24 hours of a simulated 'now'
Multiple sources are represented

requirements.text: Implement a horizontally scrolling breaking news ticker at the very top of the page displaying 10+ rotating breaking news headlines in a continuous loop.

quotes: 'Breaking News' ticker at the top scrolling horizontally
Scrolling ticker at top with 10+ breaking news headlines rotating

acceptanceCriteria: Ticker is always visible at the top of the page
At least 10 headlines scroll in a continuous loop
Animation is smooth and continuous

requirements.text: Build a slide-in settings panel (opens from the right side) containing: Dark Mode toggle, Email Delivery Mode toggle, Notification Sound toggle, Auto-refresh interval selector (30 min / 60 min / 2 hours), Font Size selector (Small / Medium / Large), Compact View toggle, Show Images toggle, per-category visibility checkboxes, editable Name and Email fields, and a 'Save Settings' button. Persist all settings to localStorage.

quotes: Settings Panel (slide-in from right)
Dark Mode toggle
Email Delivery Mode toggle
Notification Sound toggle
Auto-refresh interval: 30 min / 60 min / 2 hours
Font Size: Small / Medium / Large
Compact View toggle
Show Images toggle
Categories to show (checkboxes to hide/show tabs)
Edit Name and Email fields
'Save Settings' button

acceptanceCriteria: Panel slides in from the right when the gear icon is clicked
All settings controls are present and functional
Saving persists values to localStorage
Category visibility checkboxes hide/show the corresponding tabs
Font size and compact view changes are immediately reflected in the feed

requirements.text: Implement the email alert simulation system. When Email Delivery Mode is enabled and a DISASTER-level article is detected (severity: critical), display an in-app notification banner: 'Email alert sent to [user@email.com] about: [headline]'. Disaster categories include earthquakes, tsunamis, nuclear events, major wars, and mass casualty events.

quotes: If Email Delivery Mode is enabled, when a 'DISASTER' level article is detected (tagged with severity: critical), simulate sending an email alert
Show an in-app notification: 'Email alert sent to [user@email.com] about: [headline]'

acceptanceCriteria: Notification banner appears when a critical article is loaded and Email Delivery Mode is on
Banner displays the user's email and the article headline
No notification is shown when Email Delivery Mode is off
Notification can be dismissed

requirements.text: Apply a premium dark-mode-first glassmorphism UI theme. Default to dark mode with a toggle to light mode. Use neon cyan/blue accent colors. Apply the following category color coding — Politics: Purple, Sports: Green, War: Red, Technology: Cyan, Business: Gold, Health: Pink, Science: Orange, Entertainment: Magenta, National: Blue, International: Teal, Weather: Sky Blue. Include smooth animations on tab switch and card hover, subtle gradients, and glassmorphism card effects. Ensure full responsiveness across mobile and desktop breakpoints.

quotes: Dark mode by default (toggle to light)
Modern, sleek dark UI with neon accent colors (cyan/blue)
Responsive — works on mobile and desktop
Smooth animations on tab switch, card hover
Heavy use of glassmorphism, subtle gradients, and smooth transitions

acceptanceCriteria: App defaults to dark mode on first load
Dark/light toggle switches theme globally
Category badges use the exact specified colors
Cards use glassmorphism styling (frosted glass effect with subtle borders)
Tab switch and card hover have smooth CSS transitions
Layout is usable on mobile (320px+) and desktop (1280px+)

constraints: All data (mock articles, user preferences, settings) must be stored client-side in localStorage — no backend persistence required
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Use only the React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS stack; no external UI libraries beyond what is already present
API key for NewsAPI should be a placeholder/environment variable; primary data source must be the mock data
nonGoals: Real email delivery (SMTP, SendGrid, etc.) — only in-app simulation
Backend Motoko canister logic — this is a pure frontend app
Actual NewsAPI integration beyond a placeholder — mock data is the required fallback and primary source

required: Futuristic globe radar icon with neon cyan rings on a dark transparent background, suitable for a news app logo (globe-radar-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Dark glassmorphism news card thumbnail placeholder with subtle gradient and a faint camera icon centered (news-thumbnail-placeholder.dim_400x225.png)
